title: Kitchen Remodels
short_description: Transform your kitchen into the heart of your home with custom cabinetry, modern countertops, and thoughtful layouts designed for how you live.
description: From complete gut renovations to targeted upgrades, BT Construction delivers kitchen remodels that combine beauty and functionality. With 50 years of experience, we handle every detail — cabinets, countertops, flooring, lighting, plumbing, and electrical.
features: Granite, quartz, and butcher block countertops
